## Description

What is the technical debt item? Be specific about what needs to improve.

## Location

<!-- File paths, module names, or subsystem -->

## Current State

What is the problem? (e.g., duplication, performance, test gaps, complexity)

## Desired State

What should it look like after this is addressed?

## Impact

- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Testability
- [ ] Maintainability
- [ ] Explainability
- [ ] Determinism
- [ ] Developer Experience

## Effort Estimate

- [ ] Small (hours)
- [ ] Medium (days)
- [ ] Large (weeks)

## Related ADRs / Issues

<!-- Links to any related decisions or issues -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Anything else relevant -->
